examples: If all happened for highest good, you would not reincarnate.
Glyph of Renewed Life - All stats increased by 5% for 60 SEC when you Reincarnate.
The notion of the Reincarnate CIO reflects a state of mind, not a list of defining traits.
The boy inhabited this place like a reincarnate monk, a sprite flitting between the fallen arches, beneath the vanished porticoes.
